blended.narrative: Silver Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.9 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,281 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.3" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 30".
